response.justification: The candidate lacks any demonstrable experience in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload analysis — core requirements for the Principal Performance Architect role. Their background is exclusively in full-stack web, mobile, and embedded software development with no evidence of hardware-software co-design, GPU architecture, or performance modeling for AI accelerators.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical communication through workshops
Experience with low-latency systems and performance-critical DLang applications
concerns: No experience with SoC, IP, or AI accelerator modeling as required
Lacks background in deep-learning workload optimization or GPU architecture
No evidence of hardware-software co-design or system architecture for AI infrastructure
